title: How do I use Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor to proctor exams?
plain_text: Respondus Lockdown Browser is software that locks a student's computer during their quiz, preventing access to other pages or applications while they are taking the exam. Respondus Monitor is an add-on feature for LockDown Browser that records students as they take online exams in the Canvas environment. When this feature is enabled for a test or quiz, students are required to use a webcam and microphone with LockDown Browser. After the exam is complete, an instructor can review portions of the recorded video that are flagged based on changes in audio or the appearance of other people in the video frame. Decide whether to use Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor Respondus offers live webinars daily, and you are encouraged to sign up for training at the Respondus website. While basic questions about Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor may be answered by the Northeastern IT Service Desk, for more complex issues and questions, review the Respondus knowledge base and open a ticket with Respondus. There are a few considerations before deciding to use Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor in your course. Assign the Respondus Tech Check Quiz The benefit of using this resource is that it helps students know what to expect and directs tech questions away from you to Respondus Support, which can assist students ahead of time before they encounter an urgent issue during their final exam. Respondus Lockdown Browser requires students to download software to take the exam, which may necessitate some extra effort and troubleshooting. Prepare a quiz in Canvas Make sure the quiz has been created on Canvas. Review How do I create and grade a quiz in Canvas? for instructions on creating a Canvas quiz. Note: The quiz does not need to be published to enable LockDown Browser. You can only use Respondus Lockdown Browser with quizzes created through Canvas. It cannot be used with quizzes created through third-party tools. Provide instructions for students Students will need to download Respondus LockDown Browser. Share How do I take a test using Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor? ahead of time to help them prepare to use the software and learn how to get help. Enable Respondus Monitor (webcam feature) Additional settings will appear in the LockDown Browser Dashboard to allow you to enable Monitor and related options. Review webcam videos If students were required to use the webcam feature Respondus Monitor with the quiz, instructors can access information about the quiz sessions and review the recorded videos. Help While basic questions about Respondus LockDown Browser and Monitor may be answered by the Northeastern IT Service Desk, for more complex issues and questions, review the Respondus knowledge base and open a ticket with Respondus.
